digest.en: US President Trump extended a ceasefire with Iran. This move comes as uncertainty remains over US-Iran peace talks. Japanese Finance Minister is set to meet banks to discuss the Mythos AI model.
digest.hi: अमेरिकी राष्ट्रपति डोनाल्ड ट्रंप ने ईरान पर बमबारी की धमकी के बीच सीज़फ़ायर बढ़ाया। ट्रंप ने पाकिस्तान के अनुरोध पर यह कदम उठाया। ईरान और उसके नेताओं के खात्मे तक डील असंभव है, ट्रंप ने कहा।

articles.title: Japan finance minister to meet banks to discuss Mythos AI model, Bloomberg News reports
articles.summary: Japan's finance minister will meet with banks to discuss the Mythos AI model, according to Bloomberg News. Japan finance minister to meet banks to discuss Mythos AI model, Bloomberg News reports.

articles.title: Iran War Live Updates: Trump Extends Cease-Fire With Iran
articles.summary: Trump extended a ceasefire with Iran at Pakistan's request to mediate an end. The pause in hostilities had been set to expire within hours. The president said Pakistan, which is trying to mediate an end to the war, requested he hold off any attacks.

articles.title: Hong Kong stocks retreat after Trump extends Iran war ceasefire
articles.summary: Hong Kong stocks fell after Trump extended the Iran war ceasefire. Hong Kong stocks retreat after Trump extends Iran war ceasefire South China Morning Post.

articles.title: Trump extends Iran ceasefire but maintains blockade
articles.summary: Trump extended the Iran ceasefire while maintaining a blockade. Israel and Hezbollah trade fire with talks expected this week, even as more talks are expected in Washington this week after a 10-day ceasefire went into effect last Friday.

articles.title: Hezbollah says attacked north Israel in response to Israeli truce violations
articles.summary: Hezbollah attacked north Israel in response to alleged Israeli truce violations. It said the move came “in defence of Lebanon and its people and in response to the blatant” Israeli ceasefire violations, including “attacks on civilians and the destruction of their homes and villages”.

articles.title: US in talks to send Afghan refugees to DR Congo
articles.summary: The US is in talks to resettle Afghan refugees in the Democratic Republic of Congo. Afghan allies who assisted US forces now face a stark choice: resettle in the war‑torn Democratic Republic of Congo or return to Taliban‑ruled Afghanistan.

articles.title: Trump extends ceasefire as uncertainty over U.S.-Iran peace talks remains
articles.summary: US President Trump extended a ceasefire with Iran, maintaining a fragile calm amid uncertain peace talks. The move delays a potential escalation of the conflict, but details of a lasting agreement remain unclear.

articles.title: Trump buys time for Iran deal after frantic day of diplomacy
articles.summary: President Trump backed off a threat to escalate the conflict with Iran, extending a ceasefire for the second time in as many weeks. This buys time for diplomacy, but a final deal remains uncertain.

articles.title: Trump extends ceasefire until Iran submits proposal
articles.summary: Trump extended the ceasefire with Iran until a proposal is submitted. The move came after an Iranian commander threatened to destroy the region's oil industry. An Iranian commander had threatened to destroy the region's oil industry if war resumed with the U. S.

articles.title: Trump says ceasefire extended as talks with Tehran in limbo
articles.summary: President Trump announced an extension of the Iran ceasefire as talks with Tehran continue. The move comes as Lebanon reports 2,454 deaths and 7,658 injuries from recent Israeli attacks. Lebanon's disaster management unit raises death toll from weeks of Israeli attacks to 2,454, with 7,658 people injured.

articles.title: Trump announces extension of Iran ceasefire until ‘discussion concluded’
articles.summary: US President Trump extended the Iran ceasefire until further notice, citing ongoing discussions. The move delays a potential escalation, but no details were given on a lasting agreement. Trump announces extension of Iran ceasefire until ‘discussion concluded’.

articles.title: Trump officials consider sending 1,100 Afghans who aided US forces to Congo
articles.summary: The Trump administration considers sending 1,100 Afghans who aided US forces to the Democratic Republic of Congo. This follows Trump's decision to halt a program allowing them to resettle in the US.

articles.title: Trump extends ceasefire until Iranian proposal is submitted, talks are over
articles.summary: Trump extended the ceasefire until Iran submits a unified proposal. Pakistan requested the move to allow Iranian leaders to come up with a proposal. The U. S. President ⁠said he was acting at the request of ​Pakistan to ‌hold off attacks until Iranian leaders and representatives could come ‌up with what ​he called a unified proposal.

articles.title: Trump administration sues Southern Poverty Law Center on fraud charges
articles.summary: The US Department of Justice sued the Southern Poverty Law Center on fraud charges, targeting the civil rights group that conservative activists have long criticized for its characterizations. The civil rights group has long been a target for conservative activists, who object to its characterisations.

articles.title: US Sanctions Target Iranian Weapons, UAV Procurement Networks
articles.summary: The US imposed sanctions on Iranian weapons and UAV procurement networks. The sanctions aim to disrupt supply chains supporting Iran's military capabilities. US Sanctions Target Iranian Weapons, UAV Procurement Networks.

articles.title: Iran Threatens To End Gulf Nations' Oil Production As Truce Deadline Nears
articles.summary: Iran's Revolutionary Guards threatened to end Gulf nations' oil production. The threat was made as a truce deadline nears. Iran's Revolutionary Guards on Tuesday threatened to end oil production in the Middle East if the Islamic republic faced attacks launched from its Gulf neighbours' territory.

articles.title: Real Madrid close on Barcelona as Mbappe and Vinicius net against Alaves
articles.summary: Real Madrid beat Alaves 2-1 to close the gap with Barcelona to six points. Real Madrid beat relegation-threatened Alaves 2-1 in La Liga to close the gap with leaders Barcelona to six points.

articles.title: Trump Announces Iran Ceasefire Extension Until Negotiations Conclude
articles.summary: The US-Iran ceasefire is set to expire, casting doubt on ongoing talks. The ceasefire was established after the US-Iran war broke out on February 28, but its terms are now under review.

articles.title: Opinion | US-China AI race must strike a balance between security and openness
articles.summary: The US and China must balance security and openness in their AI race, according to an opinion piece in the South China Morning Post. Opinion | US-China AI race must strike a balance between security and openness South China Morning Post.

articles.title: Pro-Palestine legal aid requests stay high in 2025 amid US campus pressure
articles.summary: Pro-Palestine legal aid requests remained high in 2025, with a legal aid group citing continued advocacy despite the Trump administration's tactics. Legal aid group says the rate of requests shows pro-Palestine advocacy persists despite Trump administration's tactics.

articles.title: Fired U.K. Official Describes ‘Pressure’ to Expedite Envoy’s Appointment
articles.summary: A former U. K. official described pressure from Prime Minister Keir Starmer's office to expedite the appointment of Peter Mandelson as ambassador to Washington. Prime Minister Keir Starmer’s office wanted Peter Mandelson, a Jeffrey Epstein associate, swiftly installed as ambassador to Washington, the official said.

articles.title: ईरान पर बमबारी की धमकी देने वाले ट्रंप ने क्यों बढ़ाया सीज़फ़ायर?
articles.summary: डोनाल्ड ट्रंप ने ईरान पर बमबारी की धमकी दी थी, लेकिन बाद में उन्होंने सीज़फ़ायर बढ़ाने का फ़ैसला किया। यह फ़ैसला ईरान के साथ समझौता ना होने की सूरत में लिया गया था। ट्रंप ने अपनी धमकी को वापस ले लिया।

articles.title: PM मोदी ने जान गंवाने वाले निर्दोषों को याद किया; कहा- आतंक के आगे भारत कभी नहीं झुकेगा
articles.summary: प्रधानमंत्री मोदी ने पामगाम हमले की बरसी पर निर्दोषों को याद किया। उन्होंने कहा कि भारत आतंक के आगे कभी नहीं झुकेगा। मोदी के साथ राष्ट्रपति मुर्मू, अमित शाह और राजनाथ सिंह ने भी हमले में जान गंवाने वालों को श्रद्धांजलि दी।

hi.title: PM मोदी ने जान गंवाने वाले निर्दोषों को याद किया; कहा- आतंक के आगे भारत कभी नहीं झुकेगा

articles.title: 'वे इज्जत बचाना चाह रहे.., ईरान और उसके नेताओं के खात्मे तक डील असंभव'; ट्रंप का इशारा क्या?
articles.summary: डोनाल्ड ट्रंप ने कहा कि ईरान और उसके नेताओं के खात्मे तक कोई समझौता नहीं हो सकता। उन्होंने कहा कि ईरान अपनी इज्जत बचाना चाह रहा है। ट्रंप के बयान से अमेरिका और ईरान के बीच तनाव बढ़ने का संकेत मिलता है।

articles.title: अमेरिका के जहाजों की जब्ती से ईरान संघर्ष का नया चरण शुरू रिपोर्ट

articles.summary: अमेरिकी नौसेना के सबसे आधुनिक विमानवाहक पोत पर संकट के बाद भविष्य की योजनाओं पर सवाल उठने लगे हैं। इस पोत की समस्याओं ने अमेरिकी नौसेना की तैयारियों पर चिंता जताई है। इस मुद्दे पर आगे की जांच की आवश्यकता है।

articles.summary: भारत को टैरिफ रिफंड से 12 अरब डॉलर मिल सकते हैं। यह रिफंड अमेरिकी टैरिफ नीति में बदलाव के कारण हो सकता है। प्रक्रिया शुरू हो गई है। टैरिफ रिफंड से भारत को मिल सकते हैं 12 अरब डॉलर, पर सीधे नहीं।

articles.title: ईरान के बातचीत में शामिल होने को लेकर पाकिस्तान का बयान, उधर ट्रंप ने 'बमबारी' की दी चेतावनी
articles.summary: अमेरिकी राष्ट्रपति डोनाल्ड ट्रंप ने इस्लामाबाद में ईरान और अमेरिका के बीच प्रस्तावित बातचीत पर बयान दिया. अभी तक यह स्पष्ट नहीं है कि ईरान इसमें शामिल होगा या नहीं. ट्रंप ने ईरान को चेतावनी देते हुए कहा कि अगर जरूरत पड़ी तो अमेरिका बमबारी करेगा.

articles.title: UN में टूटेगा 81 साल का रिकॉर्ड? पहली महिला महासचिव बनने की रेस में ये दो दिग्गज महिलाएं सबसे आगे
articles.summary: संयुक्त राष्ट्र में 81 साल का रिकॉर्ड टूटने की संभावना है, जिसमें पहली महिला महासचिव का चयन होगा। दो दिग्गज महिलाएं इस पद के लिए सबसे आगे हैं। उनकी उम्मीदवारी ने संयुक्त राष्ट्र में चर्चा शुरू कर दी है।
